summary: Integrated ADR 0248 on synchronized main release 0.177.69 by replaying the guarded Outline service wrapper plus exact-main Keycloak and public-edge publication, preserving the shared Keycloak logout authority, oauth2-proxy cleanup flow, and Outline logout handoff on top of the 0.130.46 baseline and establishing platform version 0.130.47 after end-to-end verification.

verification.check: Integrated repo automation and validation slice
verification.observed: `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` passed, `make validate-data-models` passed, `make syntax-check-keycloak` passed, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-portals` passed, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-docs` passed after refreshing `docs/site-generated/architecture/dependency-graph.md` with `uv run --with jsonschema python scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/platform_manifest.py --check` passed, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` passed, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check` passed, `git diff --check` passed, and `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_grafana_sso_role.py tests/test_interface_contracts.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py tests/test_nginx_edge_publication_role.py tests/test_outline_runtime_role.py tests/test_public_edge_oidc_auth_role.py tests/test_session_logout_verify.py -q` returned `65 passed in 3.98s`.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces` was exercised and exposed a pre-existing unrelated registry blocker: `workstreams.yaml.workstreams[2].ownership_manifest is required for active workstreams`, which resolves to `ws-0201-main-merge` still being marked `ready_for_merge` without an ownership manifest. The ws-0248 branch-specific terminal-status behavior was also confirmed earlier: this validator intentionally rejects terminal workstreams on non-`main` branches.

The first exact-main guarded Outline replay exposed a transient Keycloak admin-token timeout after Docker activity. `curl -fsS http://10.10.10.20:8091/realms/master` returned HTTP 200 immediately afterward, and `make converge-keycloak env=production` then completed successfully with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=150 changed=0 failed=0`, `monitoring-lv3 : ok=17 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=39 changed=4 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=47 changed=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=201 changed=0 failed=0`.

`make live-apply-service service=outline env=production ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0248-main-merge` after the Keycloak recovery replay, with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=209 changed=5 failed=0`, `localhost : ok=25 changed=1 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=38 changed=2 failed=0`, and `postgres-lv3 : ok=47 changed=0 failed=0`. The run passed the `Canonical truth OK` and `Live apply contract OK` gates, exercising the `ready_for_merge` interface-contract support added for this integration.

`make configure-edge-publication env=production` completed successfully with `nginx-lv3 : ok=63 changed=6 failed=0`, reloading oauth2-proxy and NGINX after the shared logout endpoints and public site publication refresh.

`curl -I -sS https://wiki.lv3.org/` returned HTTP 200 with the expected Outline-compatible CSP override; `curl -i -sS https://home.lv3.org/.well-known/lv3/session/logout` returned HTTP 302 to `https://ops.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_out?rd=https%3A//ops.lv3.org/.well-known/lv3/session/proxy-logout`; `curl -i -sS https://ops.lv3.org/.well-known/lv3/session/proxy-logout` returned HTTP 302 to `https://ops.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_out?rd=https%3A//ops.lv3.org/.well-known/lv3/session/logged-out`; and `curl -i -sS https://ops.lv3.org/.well-known/lv3/session/logged-out` returned HTTP 200 with `Cache-Control: no-store` and `Clear-Site-Data: "cache", "cookies", "storage"`.

`uv run --with playwright python scripts/session_logout_verify.py --password-file /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/keycloak/outline.automation-password.txt` passed and reported `verified shared edge logout via https://home.lv3.org/` plus `verified Outline logout via https://wiki.lv3.org/auth/oidc`.

notes: The isolated-worktree receipt `2026-03-28-adr-0248-session-logout-authority-live-apply` remains the first-live proof for ADR 0248. This mainline receipt becomes the canonical evidence for integrated release 0.177.69 and platform version 0.130.47.

The first exact-main Outline replay failed only because the embedded Keycloak admin-token request timed out after Docker activity; the immediate HTTP 200 recovery check plus the successful standalone Keycloak replay and successful wrapper rerun show the mainline state itself was healthy.

This integration also validates the `ready_for_merge` interface-contract support added in `platform/interface_contracts.py`, because the guarded mainline wrapper completed successfully against the merged-workstream registry state instead of rejecting the workstream status.

The only remaining validation-path blocker observed during this integration is unrelated to ADR 0248: `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces` is currently blocked by the older `ws-0201-main-merge` registry entry, not by the session/logout authority surfaces or receipt.
